Custom 10K Race Banners for Start Lines, Finish Lines & Sponsor Recognition

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your next 10K race with eye-catching, professionally printed vinyl banners. Whether you need starting line banners, finish line signage, sponsor recognition displays, or course direction markers, Banners.com delivers high-quality 10K banners built to perform outdoors on race day.

From event displays and registration areas to hydration stations and first aid markers, our custom 10K banners help runners and spectators navigate your event with ease. Every banner is printed in full color on durable vinyl using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant graphics that stand out along the course.

At Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a 10K banner you are proud to display. That is why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They are deeply familiar with the nuances of custom banner printing and are dedicated to ensuring you receive a tailor-made 10K banner. If something does not meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to resolve it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom 10K banner options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your banner is delivered before race day. Get started on your 10K banner today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

If we did not answer all your questions, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request. Request a custom quote for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Material Options for Durable 10K Race Signage

Your 10K banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (e.g., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your 10K banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl 10K Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular option. It has a low shine and rich color gamut, making it ideal for 10K race signage that needs to look professional without glare.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl 10K Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics. This gives your 10K banners a high-end, polished appearance along the racecourse.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Vinyl 10K Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest option. It features a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. This material is well suited for large 10K race banners that need to withstand outdoor conditions.

Mesh 10K Banners for Outdoor Courses

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh 10K banners are ideal for outdoor and windy race day conditions along fences and barriers.

Fabric 10K Banners for Indoor Events

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor 10K event displays such as registration areas and award ceremonies. It has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive 10K Banners for Smooth Surfaces

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for 10K Race Banner Installation

Heat-Welded Hems & Grommets

These are a one-inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2 to 4 feet. Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. Hems are recommended for all 10K banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems — Standard finishing option for vinyl 10K banners.

All Four Sides Hems — All 4 sides of the 10K banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets for 10K Banner Mounting

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner. A sleeve is added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

  • 2" Pole Pockets — fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets — fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets — fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your 10K banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners for 10K Banner Durability

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the 10K banner. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners.

Reinforced Hems for Long-Lasting 10K Banners

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the 10K banner. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided 10K Banner Finishing

Double-sided 10K banners can be finished up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

Wind slits are not recommended for 10K banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for 10K Banner Printing

The file format that prints best for 10K banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork & Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your 10K banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, your order will not be sent into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your 10K banner project is color critical, the Color Match Proof System is recommended. This is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom 10K Banners

Flexible production time ranges are available for your custom 10K banners. Because it is important for you to have ultimate control over your order, production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your 10K race banners delivered.

1 Business Day Priority

Timelines can be tight when race day is approaching. That is why we offer this one-day turnaround option for 10K banners.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express

Have an extra day, but still need your 10K banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

3 Business Days Standard

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy for most custom 10K banner orders.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

5 Business Days Saver

If your 10K event is not imminent, you can save money by choosing the 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

10K Banner Payment & Checkout Options

All 10K banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping & Delivery for Custom 10K Race Banners

If you have any questions about shipping your 10K banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to placing your order. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1 to 3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your 10K banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. Banner costs will not be refunded if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7 to 10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping for 10K Banners

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, only international shipping labels from USPS and UPS are accepted.

Shipping Facility Locations

Vinyl Banners & Mesh 10K Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric 10K Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Available Shipping Methods

The following shipping methods are available for your 10K banner order:

  • Standard (3 to 5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping Details

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 to 10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Popular Uses for Custom 10K Race Banners

Thousands of 10K banners are printed each year for race organizers, sponsors, and event coordinators. Whether you are planning a charity fun run or a competitive 10K race, custom banners help you communicate with runners and spectators at every stage of the event.

Starting Line & Finish Line Banners

Mark the official start and finish of your 10K with bold, full-color banners that are visible from a distance. Starting line and finish line banners set the tone for your race and create memorable photo opportunities for runners.

Sponsor & Partner Recognition Banners

Display sponsor logos and partner branding along the course, at the starting area, and near the finish line. Sponsor recognition 10K banners help fulfill sponsorship commitments and increase brand visibility on race day.

Course Direction & Wayfinding Banners

Guide runners along the 10K course with clearly marked directional signage. Course banners help prevent wrong turns and keep participants moving safely through the race route.

Registration & First Aid Station Banners

Identify key event areas such as registration desks, bib pickup, first aid stations, and hydration points. Clear signage at these locations reduces confusion and improves the overall runner experience.

Promotional & Pre-Race Event Banners

Build excitement and drive registrations with promotional 10K banners displayed at local businesses, community centers, and event venues in the weeks leading up to race day.

Popular Banner Categories for 10K Events

  • Event Banners
  • Sports Banners
  • Advertising Banners
  • Business Banners
  • View All Categories
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom 10K Banners Online

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color 10K banners take your race event to the next level. At Banners.com, we deliver professionally printed 10K race banners with fast turnaround and outdoor durability so your signage is ready before the starting gun fires.

Whether you need starting line banners, finish line displays, sponsor recognition signage, or course direction markers, our custom 10K banners are printed on durable vinyl, mesh, or fabric materials using state-of-the-art, large-format printers. Every banner is manufactured in the USA and backed by our in-house team of graphic designers and production experts.

Choose from six material options, multiple finishing styles, and sizes up to 8'x50'. Use our online designer, upload your own artwork, or let our professional designers create a custom layout for your 10K event. With production times as fast as one business day and shipping to 90% of the United States in 1 to 3 days, your 10K banners will arrive on time.

Request a custom quote or start designing your 10K banners today. For questions, call our in-house customer support team at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About 10K Banners

What materials are available for 10K banners?

10K banners are available in six materials: 13 oz matte vinyl, 13 oz gloss vinyl, 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl, mesh, fabric, and adhesive vinyl. For outdoor race courses, 13 oz matte vinyl and mesh are the most popular choices due to their durability and wind resistance.

What finishing options work best for outdoor 10K race banners?

For outdoor 10K race installations, heat-welded hems and grommets are the standard finishing option. Reinforced hems and reinforced corners add extra durability for banners mounted on fences, barriers, or poles along the course. Pole pockets are available for banners that need to slide onto a dowel or pole for mounting.

How fast can I get my 10K banners printed and delivered?

Production times range from 1 to 5 business days. The 1 Business Day Priority option is the fastest turnaround available. Combined with overnight shipping, you can receive your 10K banners in as little as 2 business days from order approval.

What file formats are accepted for 10K banner artwork?

The preferred file format is .eps converted to outline. High-resolution .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files (300 dpi or higher) are also accepted. Files must be 60 MB or smaller. For larger files, please contact customer service for upload instructions.

Can I order double-sided 10K banners?

Yes, double-sided 10K banners can be finished up to 150 square feet. For larger double-sided banners, a custom quote is required. Double-sided banners are ideal for 10K course signage that needs to be visible from both directions.

What sizes are available for 10K race banners?

10K banners are available in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50'. Height options range from 1.0' to 8.0' in half-foot increments, and width options range from 1.0' to 50.0' in half-foot increments. For sizes larger than 8'x50', visit the oversized banners page.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
